GG0110B Prior Device: Motorized Wheelchair and/or Scooter Indicates the patient's prior use of a motorized wheelchair and/or scooter. CHAR 1 x x
GG0110C_PRIOR_MCHNCL_LIFT_IND GG0110C Prior Device: Mechanical Lift Indicates the patient's prior use of a mechanical lift. CHAR 1 x x
GG0110D_PRIOR_WLKR_IND GG0110D Prior Device: Walker Indicates the patient's prior use of a walker. CHAR 1 x x
